items.text: line 5: This is a breaking release. Compatibility redirects and task-shaped aliases are not kept after the cutover boundary. Operators must keep the previous worker build draining on the legacy Task Queue for in-flight `MoonMind.Run` histories, or record an explicit pause/resume or terminate/restart decision before enabling `TEMPORAL_USER_WORKFLOW_CONTRACT_MODE=renamed_contract`.
